products.name: Cable Assemblies
products.descriptor: Custom electrical cable assemblies built to customer drawing

evidence.snippet: UK Specialists in the manufacture of custom cable assemblies and harnesses. Handling complexity from discrete wires to 1000 circuit looms.

products.name: Wiring Looms
products.descriptor: Custom multi-wire harness looms up to 1000 circuits

evidence.snippet: UK Specialists in the manufacture of custom cable assemblies and harnesses. Handling complexity from discrete wires to 1000 circuit looms.

products.name: Military Harnessing
products.descriptor: Defence-grade wire harnesses built to TYCO/Raychem System 25 standards

evidence.snippet:
Specialising in Defence, Medical, and Aerospace projects. Looms built to TYCO System 25 standards for high-reliability systems.
[Find out more](/services/cable-assemblies)

products.name: Motorsport Harnessing
products.descriptor: Motorsport and F1 wiring looms built to Raychem System 25 standards

evidence.snippet:
Wiring Harnesses Built to Win
=============================
Specialists in Motorsport and F1 looms. Expertise in Raychem System 25 standards and guaranteed 100% Cirris tested for ultimate reliability.
[Find out more](/services/motorsport-harnessing)

products.name: IDC Ribbon Cables
products.descriptor: Insulation displacement connector ribbon cable assemblies

products.name: RF Cables
products.descriptor: Custom RF coaxial cable assemblies for signal transmission

products.name: Low Pressure Moulding
products.descriptor: Subcontract overmoulding service for cable and connector protection

evidence.snippet: From the exacting standards of Medical and Industrial X-Ray equipment, the rigorous requirements of the off-shore and airborne industries, to the precision demanded by aerospace, military and motorsport customers, we provide excellent solutions for even the toughest applications.

products.notes: Described in 2015 blog post; not listed in main services nav menu.
